name: WhiteHawk Minerals Corp.
business: WhiteHawk Minerals Corp. acquires and manages mineral and royalty interests in natural gas and oil properties, generating revenue from royalty payments based on production and commodity prices. The company relies on third-party operators to explore and develop its acreage, with a focus on the Appalachian Basin, Haynesville Basin, and Mid-Con region.

exposures.sentence: Our revenues are primarily derived from mineral and royalty payments that are based on the price of natural gas, NGL and oil.
Our growth strategy is partly dependent upon the continued expansion of electricity demand driven by AI data center development
availability and development of liquefaction facilities to support LNG export demand

catalysts.sentence: The Haynesville Assets acquisition closed on April 3, 2026.
